faqs.answer: Rat extermination in Fordham typically costs between $350 and $600, depending on the severity of the infestation, property size, and number of entry points. We provide free inspections and detailed quotes before starting any work, with no obligation.

The mix of restaurants, student housing, and residential buildings creates ideal conditions for rat activity year-round.
